onboarding.title: Set up your garage
onboarding.subtitle: One step before you begin.
onboarding.name: Your garage name
onboarding.error: Could not create. Please try again.

dashboard.setupIntro: Your workspace is ready. The following parts are coming soon.
dashboard.incomingEmpty: No requests yet. Share your form link below to get started.
dashboard.shareIntro: Share this link with your customers. Every request lands here automatically.
dashboard.daySummary: Today: {count} new requests, {urgent} urgent, {upcoming} appointments scheduled.
dashboard.robinIntro: I'm keeping an eye on your calls, email, WhatsApp and appointments. Nothing slips through today.
dashboard.robinSummary: There are {count} new requests, {waiting} waiting for a reply and {upcoming} appointments scheduled.
dashboard.robinAsk: What do you want me to take care of?
dashboard.nudge: {count} customer(s) have been waiting more than 30 minutes. Want me to pick up the first one?
dashboard.step1: Share your request form with customers.
dashboard.notifAllCaughtUp: You're all caught up. No notifications.
dashboard.vehiclesSubtitle: What's on the shop floor right now.
dashboard.vehiclesEmpty: No vehicles being worked on yet.
dashboard.metricsEmptyNew: No activity yet. Once your first request comes in, I'll track it all here.
dashboard.metricsEmptyQuiet: Quiet day. Everything's under control, Robin's keeping watch in the meantime.

insight.emptyGarage: You don't have any customers yet. Share your request form, and I'll catch every new request and sort out the rest.
insight.urgentLead: {name} just sent something urgent. Worth a look.
insight.waitingCustomers: {count} customer(s) have been waiting a while. Should I get the first one ready for you?
insight.followupsDue: There are {count} follow-up(s) ready for today.
insight.allClear: Everything's under control, nothing urgent right now. I'll keep watching the rest.

robinChat.title: Robin
robinChat.subtitle: Ask what's going on in your garage.
robinChat.emptyHint: Try one of these, or just type your own.
robinChat.suggestion1: How many appointments do I have tomorrow?

answers.apptsTomorrowNone: Nothing on the books for tomorrow.
answers.unansweredNone: Everyone's got a reply already. Nice work.
answers.unansweredCount: {count} customer(s) still waiting on a reply: {list}
answers.callWho: Who should I call? Try "Call John Smith".
answers.callNotFound: Can't find anyone with that name. Try the full name.
answers.callNoPhone: I don't have a number for {name}.
answers.callFound: {name}: {phone}. Can't dial it myself yet, but there's the number.
answers.greeting: Hey! What can I help with?
answers.thanks: No problem. I'll keep an eye on things.
answers.fallback: I can help with tomorrow's appointments, vehicles waiting, customers without a reply, or calling someone. Try "Call [name]".

newVehicle.title: New vehicle
newVehicle.error: Something went wrong. Pick or create a customer, then try again.
newVehicle.limitReached: You've reached the maximum number of vehicles included in your plan. Upgrade to continue.

lead.proposeIntro: Pick a proposed time. You decide.
lead.noSlots: No free times found. Check your opening hours.
lead.alreadyBooked: This request already has an appointment.
lead.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

agenda.title: Agenda
agenda.pickDayHint: Pick a day in the calendar to view or add appointments.
agenda.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

conversation.title: Conversation
conversation.handoff: Safety: this looks urgent. Contact the customer directly, no automatic reply.
conversation.note: You send it. Roavaa only proposes.

team.title: Team
team.inviteIntro: Add a colleague with a role.
team.inviteNote: The invitation is ready. Email delivery comes in a later step.
team.limitReached: You've reached the maximum number of users included in your plan. Upgrade to invite more people.

customers.title: Customers
customers.search: Search by name, phone or email
customers.empty: No customers yet. They appear here as requests come in.

workOrders.title: Work orders
workOrders.checklistIntro: Check every point on the vehicle and record the result.
workOrders.checklistEmpty: No checklist for this order yet. Add an item below or set up the default checklist in Settings.
workOrders.reportIntro: Robin prepares a professional report and a client message from the checklist and photo diagnoses.
workOrders.reportEmpty: Nothing to report yet: complete the checklist or run a photo diagnosis first.
workOrders.reportError: Report generation failed. Please try again.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

vehicles.title: Vehicles
vehicles.search: Search by plate, make or model
vehicles.photoError: Upload failed. Use an image of 8 MB or smaller.

settings.title: Settings
settings.billingIntro: What Roavaa costs, once billing is switched on.
settings.billingFreeNote: You're using Roavaa fully free during launch. This price will be announced well in advance of any billing ever starting.
settings.billingTrialDays: {count, plural, =1 {# day} other {# days}} left in your trial.
settings.name: Name
settings.hoursIntro: Controls which times Roavaa can propose.
settings.servicesIntro: Duration and buffer shape the proposed times.
settings.deleteConfirm: This service will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
settings.checklistIntro: Customize what your mechanics check when a vehicle comes in.
settings.checklistDeleteConfirm: This checklist item will be removed from the default template.

knowledge.title: Knowledge base
knowledge.intro: Your garage's know-how. Roavaa will use it later to answer better.
knowledge.empty: Nothing yet. Add your first knowledge.
knowledge.deleteConfirm: This article will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

automations.title: Follow-ups
automations.intro: What Roavaa would follow up today. You decide and send.
automations.empty: Nothing to follow up. All clear.

msg.reminder: Remind {name} of the appointment and confirm the time.
msg.unanswered: Reply to {name}: the request is still waiting.
msg.post_repair: Ask {name} if all is well and request a Google review.
msg.reactivate: Reach out to {name} again with an offer.

automations.lockedTitle: Feature not included in your plan
automations.lockedMessage: Automations (follow-ups, reminders) are included from the Professional plan onward. Check pricing to upgrade.

newCustomer.title: New customer
newCustomer.intro: Add a customer, and a vehicle right away if you like.
newCustomer.vehicleHint: Leave empty to add only the customer.

diagnosis.title: Photo diagnosis
diagnosis.intro: Add photos from different angles — front, engine, dashboard, underside — and Robin AI puts together one full report.
diagnosis.error: Upload failed. Try again with photos up to 4 MB, 10 total max.
diagnosis.disclaimer: This analysis is a diagnostic aid and does not replace a professional's assessment. Always confirm yourself before starting any repair.
diagnosis.limitReached: You've reached this month's Robin AI analyses included in your plan. Upgrade to continue.

home.title: Your digital head office
home.subtitle: A calm, considered workspace where your AI employee responds, organizes and learns, so no request is ever lost.

respond.title: Responds
respond.body: Every request gets an immediate, human and professional reply, day and night.

organize.title: Organizes
organize.body: Customers, vehicles and appointments are sorted on their own, without admin.

learn.title: Learns
learn.body: The system remembers your preferences and gets a little better every week.

memories.title: Three kinds of memory
memories.intro: Real intelligence comes from remembering at the right level.

garage.title: Company memory
garage.body: Knows your hours, your team, your tone and your preferences. Stays private to you.

trade.title: Trade memory
trade.body: Knows repairs, parts, emergencies and the questions common to the industry.

global.title: Shared memory
global.body: Learns anonymously which replies and reminders work best.

checklist.title: What this page verifies
checklist.intro: A small witness page to check the foundations.

phase.label: Phase 0
phase.note: Technical foundation only. No login, dashboard or real AI yet.

assistant.message: A new request from Ms. De Vries looks urgent. I've drafted a reply and proposed two time slots.

footer.rights: Internal foundation build. Not for production.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Get started with Roavaa for your garage.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: We will send you a reset link.

messages.checkEmail: Almost there. Check your email to confirm your account.
messages.resetSent: If that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Check your details and try again.

request.title: Request your appointment
request.subtitle: Tell us briefly what is wrong with your car. We will get back to you soon.
request.privacy: By submitting, you agree that we may contact you about your request.
request.error: Something went wrong. Check your details and try again.
request.sentTitle: Thank you, your request has been sent.
request.sentBody: {garage} has received your request and will contact you soon.
request.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. my brakes have been squeaking for a week.

fields.description: What is wrong with your car?

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Clear, no surprises. Here's what Roavaa costs.
pricing.betaBanner: ROAVAA is currently free during the testing phase. The prices below are indicative and may change before the official commercial launch.
pricing.paymentNotActive: No payment is active yet. The "Subscribe" button will be enabled at official launch.

features.storage: {count} GB of photo and video storage
